pitch: We're building an AI-powered social network for pet owners. Users post photos of their pets, and our AI generates personality profiles, suggests playmates nearby, and recommends products. Revenue is from affiliate fees on pet product sales and premium AI features at $9.99/month. We believe the market is huge — there are 90 million dog owners in the US alone. We're a team of three former product managers from consumer apps. We have no MVP yet but have done 50 customer interviews and 80% said they would 'definitely' use the app. Raising $2M to build the MVP and acquire 100k users in year one through influencer marketing.
context: No technical co-founder yet. No prototype. All three founders have been laid off and are working on this full-time. Competition includes Petco's app, Rover, and various pet-photo subreddits.
